robots.name: Circuit Simulator
robots.description: Full quantum circuit editor + state-vector simulator. Click to place gates, see amplitudes + probabilities. Up to 6 qubits. Run 100 shots.

robots.name: Bloch Sphere
robots.description: 3D qubit state visualization — apply X/Y/Z/H/S/T gates, see state vector + probabilities update live.

robots.name: Quantum Gates
robots.description: Interactive gate reference — matrix, Bloch rotation, properties for every standard gate.

robots.name: Entanglement
robots.description: Bell pair experiment — create entangled qubits, measure, see 100% correlation over 100 runs.

robots.name: Grover's Search
robots.description: Quantum search — watch amplitude amplification, compare sqrt(N) quantum vs N classical steps.
